labels.description: Labels as key value pairs. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

kms_key.description: Customer-managed encryption key name, in the format projects/*/locations/*/keyRings/*/cryptoKeys/*.

private_config.description: Private settings for private instance. Structure is [documented below](#nested_private_config).

ca_pool.description: CA pool resource, resource must in the format of `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/caPools/{ca_pool}`.

http_service_attachment.description: (Output) Service Attachment for HTTP, resource is in the format of `projects/{project}/regions/{region}/serviceAttachments/{service_attachment}`.

ssh_service_attachment.description: (Output) Service Attachment for SSH, resource is in the format of `projects/{project}/regions/{region}/serviceAttachments/{service_attachment}`.

workforce_identity_federation_config.description: Configuration for Workforce Identity Federation to support third party identity provider. If unset, defaults to the Google OIDC IdP. Structure is [documented below](#nested_workforce_identity_federation_config).

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

deletion_policy.description: to be abandoned, rather than deleted. Setting `DELETE` deletes the resource and all its contents. Setting `PREVENT` prevents the resource from accidental deletion by erroring out during plan. Default is `DELETE`.  Possible values are: * DELETE * PREVENT * ABANDON
